title: geum sachalinense
intro: Geum sachalinense, also known as the Korean mountain avens, is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of East Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is rich in flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, making it beneficial for various health issues, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Geum sachalinense is traditionally used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
